---
title: "100 Days of Code"
format: html
---

## Description

This section is part journal, part learning log. I’m using the **#100DaysOfCode** challenge to build consistent coding habits and sharpen my skills. Each entry will either be a quick write-up of what I’ve coded that day, or a summary of something I’ve read or practiced 
 all with a focus on clean, professional documentation. Whether it’s a new project, debugging insight, or notes from a tutorial, this log is about steady progress and reflection.



## 📚 Recent Posts

- [2025-07-17 — Day 1](Day1.qmd)
